mapper.select: SELECT * FROM students WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM students ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (student_number, name, password, email, phone, class_name, major, grade, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{studentNumber}, #{name}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{className}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE students student_number = #{studentNumber}, name = #{name}, password = #{password}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, class_name = #{className}, major = #{major}, grade = #{grade}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM students WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM students WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE student_number = #{studentNumber}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE student_number = #{studentNumber} OR email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM students WHERE student_number = #{studentNumber}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM students WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE class_name = #{className}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE major = #{major}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE grade = #{grade}
SELECT * FROM students WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')

SELECT * FROM students WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR student_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR class_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR major LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE class_name = #{className}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE major = #{major}
SELECT DISTINCT class_name FROM students WHERE class_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY class_name
SELECT DISTINCT major FROM students WHERE major IS NOT NULL ORDER BY major
SELECT DISTINCT grade FROM students WHERE grade IS NOT NULL ORDER BY grade
